title: vigna vexillata var. macrosperma
intro: Vigna vexillata var. macrosperma, also known as the bush bean or hairy vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to lower cholesterol levels and aid in the management of diabetes. The herbal preparations of Vigna vexillata var. macrosperma often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which are used to treat various ailments.
